since_last: 25% of 100 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.31%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 25% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.32% · BTC -0.89% · Gold -1.23% · Nasdaq100 -1.40%. 25% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.31%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.31%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -5.54%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at -10.33%
cards.body: Leaders: INTU +5.58%, AVAV +4.87%, CRM +3.54%, ADBE +3.40%, IBM +3.21%. Laggards: SKHY -10.33%, SMR -9.93%, OKLO -9.41%, CEVA -9.32%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.97% at $132.6
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.97% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
